content.problemStatement:
Chef is observing stock prices.

You are given an array pricespricesprices where prices[i]prices[i]prices[i] is the price of a given stock on the ithi^{\text{th}}ith day.

Chef wants to maximize his profit by choosing **one day to buy** and a **different future day to sell**.

Return the **maximum profit** Chef can achieve. If no profit is possible, return 000.

**Function Declaration****Function Name**findMaxProfitfindMaxProfitfindMaxProfit – Computes the maximum achievable profit by buying on one day and selling on a later day.

**Parameters**
pricespricesprices : A list/array of integers where 

prices[i]prices[i]prices[i] = stock price on day iii.
**Return Value**
Returns an **integer** — 

the maximum profit Chef can make.
If no profitable transaction is possible, return 000.
Constraints:
2≤n≤1052 \leq n \leq 10^52≤n≤105
0≤prices[i]≤1040 \leq prices[i] \leq 10^40≤prices[i]≤104

Input Format

nnn → number of days
Next line → **n integers** representing stock prices


Output Format
Print the maximum profit Chef can achieve.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of two lines: the first line contains an integer N, the number of days. The second line contains N space‑separated integers denoting the stock prices on each day.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single integer – the maximum profit that can be obtained by buying on one day and selling on a later day. If no profit is possible, print 0.

solution.approach: While scanning the price array keep track of the minimum price seen so far. For each price compute the profit if we sold today (price - minPrice). Update the answer with the maximum such profit. This works because any optimal transaction must buy at the lowest price before the selling day, and scanning once guarantees we consider every possible sell day with the best possible earlier buy.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) per test case, O(total N) over all test cases.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) extra space besides input storage.
